steps: Go to https://dashboard.svix.com and log in or create a free Svix account
Navigate to the 'API Access' section in the left sidebar (or go to https://dashboard.svix.com/api-access)
Your organization's API key is displayed on this page
Copy the API key — it starts with a prefix indicating the environment (e.g., testsk_ for test, sk_ for production)
Use the API key as a Bearer token in the Authorization header: 'Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Svix API key found in the Dashboard under API Access. Used as a Bearer token.

notes: Free tier available (limited to development/testing usage)
API keys are per-environment — use test environment keys for development
The API key grants full access to your Svix organization — keep it secret
EU region API: https://api.eu.svix.com; US region API: https://api.us.svix.com (default: https://api.svix.com)
Svix also provides a hosted App Portal for your customers to manage their own webhook endpoints

test_endpoint.description: List webhook applications to verify the API key
